column.name: sum(CASE WHEN tpch_sf1.part.p_type LIKE Utf8("PROMO%") THEN tpch_sf1.lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - tpch_sf1.lineitem.l_discount ELSE Int64(0) END)
